primary_metric: Every gate that ever fired has a current `last_fired_at` ISO timestamp in `.claude/shared/gate-last-fired.json`
success_metrics: 100% of gates currently in `.claude/logs/gate-coverage.jsonl` appear in `.claude/shared/gate-last-fired.json` after `scripts/refresh-gate-last-fired.py` runs (T1, measured by set difference)
Index refresh wall-clock <2s for the current ~1900-row gate-coverage.jsonl (T1, measured via time)
Index is included in the daily `make integrity-check` flow + nightly refresh in `framework-status-weekly.yml`
Subsequent `GATE_COVERAGE_ZERO` meta-check (planned for v7.10) reads from this O(1) index instead of scanning O(records × gates)
kill_criteria: Refresh wall-clock >10s on the canonical ledger — operators won't tolerate the lag in interactive sessions
Index loses an event class (e.g., advisory-only firings drop from input) — readers get a false-positive 'gate never fired' signal
Schema drift between refresh script's expected input and gate_coverage.py output — silent stale index
kill_criteria_resolution: K1 (wall-clock) measured at <1s — well under 10s threshold. K2 + K3 require sustained operation to evaluate; reviewed at quarterly audits.
dispatch_pattern: agent-driven (script + integration into integrity-check + daily-checkpoint + weekly cron)
scope_summary: Produce `.claude/shared/gate-last-fired.json` — a per-gate `last_fired_at` + `last_checked_at` + `last_skipped_at` + `total_firings` + `total_skips` index derived from `.claude/logs/gate-coverage.jsonl`. Update via `scripts/refresh-gate-last-fired.py` invoked from (a) `make integrity-check`, (b) `daily-integrity-checkpoint.py`, (c) `framework-status-weekly.yml`. Enables `GATE_COVERAGE_ZERO` meta-check at O(1) — the planned v7.10 advisory that catches gates which haven't fired in N days despite producing telemetry. Independent of F16 (no calibration window needed; read-only derived artifact). Out of scope: the GATE_COVERAGE_ZERO meta-check itself (separate v7.10 feature); time-series storage (only `last_*` per gate); per-mode breakdown (aggregate across staged + cycle).

tasks.description: Write scripts/refresh-gate-last-fired.py — reads gate-coverage.jsonl line-by-line, builds per-gate aggregates, writes .claude/shared/gate-last-fired.json
Unit tests at scripts/tests/test_refresh_gate_last_fired.py — empty input, single-gate, multi-gate, malformed-row resilience, idempotent re-runs
Add `make gate-last-fired` Makefile target invoking the refresh script
Wire refresh into `make integrity-check` (run before integrity checks)
Initial materialization of .claude/shared/gate-last-fired.json from current ledger
Add F17 section to CLAUDE.md v7.9.1 area
Dev-guide §12 v7.9.1 row gets F17 mention
Source case study + fitme-story showcase MDX slot 45

implementation.notes: Per F17 dependency-graph note (infra-master-plan §3.5): 'F17 is independent — can start any time; minimal calibration needed since it's a read-only derived artifact.' No advisory window; direct implementation. Skipping Phase 0+1+2 since the spec is concrete + single-file scope.

complete.notes: All T1-T10 done. Read-only derived artifact — no advisory window.
